titleStmt.title: SII 18.51: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 51. (B.K. No. 126 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south entrance to the Ārk-Killā.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 958, Srīmukha, Vaiśākha śu. Pūrṇimā, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The cyclic year Śrīmukha coincided with Śaka 955 and in that year Vaiśākha śu. Pūrṇimā fell on April 7, A.D. 1033, Tuesday. It was not a day of any Saṁkrānti. The details do not work out correctly in Śaka 958 either. It appears from the characters in which the record is engraved, that it belongs to a much laterperiod (about 12th century) than the date to which it purports to belong. The mention of Anantapāḷa, the famous general of Vikramāditya VI, and the palaeography raise a doubt regarding the genuineness of the record.

It registers a grant of land made by Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati Ānandapāḷar, daṇḍanāyaka (also spelt as Ānantapāḷa and Anantapāḷa) for the worship of and offerings to god Narasiṁhadēva of Jalamaṇṭapa at Vijayāpura which is described as rāya-rājadhāni. The land granted is stated to have been purchased from Hiriya Kēśirāja and his son Siṅgarasa. The former was the mahāprabhu of Dantiyahaḷḷi, a suburb (pravishṭa) of Vijayāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyavutta
rōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara salu
ttaṁmire śrīmajjagadēkavalladēvarddayaṁgeyye sakavarṣada
658 neya śrīmukha saṁvatserada vaśyāga suddha puṇnami Ādivāra vitī
pātamuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiparvvanimittadalu śrīmanumahā
pradhānaṁ sēnāddhipati Ānaṁdapāḷadaṁṇāyakaru śrīmajjagadēka
malladēvara nirupadiṁ tardavāḍiya duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipālanadi
ṁdāḷutaṁmire rāyarājadhāni vijayapurada naṁda
jalamaṁṭapada śrīnarasiṁhvadēvargge Ānaṁdapāḷadēvadaṁṇnāykaru
jīrnnōdhāravāge māḍisida raṁgamaṁṭapada paḍuvageyavakyūḷava Ā dē
vara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgārdhdhavāgi Ānaṁtapāḷadēvadaṁṇāykara kaya
li vijayapurada praviṣṭa daṁtiyahaḷḷiya mahāprabhu hiriya kēsirā
jayaṁgaḷuṁ maga siṁgarsanuṁ Ā daṁtiyahaḷḷiya Eraḍusāyira mattara staḷado
ḷage koṁḍu bāviya yiṁ paḍuvallidda dasavaṁdada mattaru
200 Adaṟa beṁbagiya mugilu mānya Ā Eraḍu sāyirakkenā
ḍava Alliya mēṭigoḷaga muligamukya Eṁṭu hiṭṭikkuvaṁtā
ruvaṇadāya vurada brāhmaru yikkuva mattaru mage yiṁtivu
mukya Aṣṭabhōga tējasāmya haṟavaṇa magavaḷi vuṁbaḷi beṁbaḷi Akṣi
ṇi Āgāmi naṣṭastaḷa samastasāmyasahita Ānaṁtapāḷadēvadaṁṇāyakaru
Ā kēsirājayaṁgavu maga siṁgarsaṁgevu tatukālōcitavappa vubheyacha
trada Ayinūṟu gadyāṇa hoṁna koṭṭu krayadhāreya kaḷadukoṁḍu
Ā narasiṁhvadēvargge niIvēdyada paṁcaparvva naḍavaṁtāgi Anaṁtapā
ḷadēvadaṁṇāyka maṁneya
rasa The continuation is
Digital edition of SII 18.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
